text: Oh man, I remember making this pic for /v/ all the way back then when I was still only posting my art anonymously. I was still pretty shit at drawing at the time, so I had to trace the original image using a mouse and the vector tool in Photoshop CS2, but I'm glad people like OP liked it enough to share it around and add sound to it.
